# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates curl gnupg2 \
    supervisor \
    nginx \
    redis-server \
    postgresql postgresql-contrib \
    python3 python3-venv python3-pip \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN sed -i 's/^#\?listen_addresses\s*=.*/listen_addresses = '\''0.0.0.0'\''/' /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf \
 && sed -i "s/^#\?port\s*=.*/port = 5432/" /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf \
 && grep -qE '^\s*host\s+all\s+all\s+0\.0\.0\.0/0\s+trust\s*$' /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf \
    || echo 'host all all 0.0.0.0/0 trust' >> /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf \
 && grep -qE '^\s*host\s+all\s+all\s+::/0\s+trust\s*$' /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf \
    || echo 'host all all ::/0 trust' >> /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf

RUN sed -i 's/^bind .*/bind 0.0.0.0 ::1/' /etc/redis/redis.conf \
 && sed -i 's/^protected-mode .*/protected-mode no/' /etc/redis/redis.conf

RUN rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
RUN printf '%s\n' \
'server {' \
'  listen 80 default_server;' \
'  listen [::]:80 default_server;' \
'  location / {' \
'    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8080;' \
'    proxy_set_header Host $host;' \
'    proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;' \
'    proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;' \
'    proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;' \
'  }' \
'}' \
> /etc/nginx/sites-available/app.conf \
 && ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/app.conf /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/app.conf

RUN mkdir -p /opt/api
RUN printf '%s\n' \
'#!/usr/bin/env python3' \
'from http.server import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, HTTPServer' \
'import os' \
'' \
'class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):' \
'    def do_GET(self):' \
'        self.send_response(200)' \
'        self.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json")' \
'        self.end_headers()' \
'        self.wfile.write((\'{"ok":true,"path":"%s"}\' % self.path).encode())' \
'' \
'if __name__ == "__main__":' \
'    host = os.environ.get("API_HOST", "0.0.0.0")' \
'    port = int(os.environ.get("API_PORT", "8080"))' \
'    HTTPServer((host, port), Handler).serve_forever()' \
> /opt/api/app.py \
 && chmod +x /opt/api/app.py

RUN printf '%s\n' \
'[supervisord]' \
'nodaemon=true' \
'logfile=/dev/null' \
'pidfile=/run/supervisord.pid' \
'' \
'[program:nginx]' \
'command=/usr/sbin/nginx -g "daemon off;"' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'stdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1' \
'stdout_logfile_maxbytes=0' \
'stderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2' \
'stderr_logfile_maxbytes=0' \
'' \
'[program:redis]' \
'command=/usr/bin/redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'stdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1' \
'stdout_logfile_maxbytes=0' \
'stderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2' \
'stderr_logfile_maxbytes=0' \
'' \
'[program:postgres]' \
'command=/usr/lib/postgresql/*/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/*/main -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf' \
'user=postgres' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'stdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1' \
'stdout_logfile_maxbytes=0' \
'stderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2' \
'stderr_logfile_maxbytes=0' \
'' \
'[program:api]' \
'command=/usr/bin/python3 /opt/api/app.py' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'stdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1' \
'stdout_logfile_maxbytes=0' \
'stderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2' \
'stderr_logfile_maxbytes=0' \
> /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord","-c","/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
